adds.rationale: Cameco is the largest Western uranium producer and a direct pure-play on the nuclear-fuel-cycle leg of the next-waves thesis (SMRs + AI-datacenter PPAs in the longer term, fuel-supply tightness now). Complements URA's basket exposure with operational leverage. Through Q2 2021 uranium spot was firming on Kazatomprom + Cameco production cuts and the run-up to the Sprott Physical Uranium Trust (launched mid-2021), all dated pre-2021-07-01.

Lockheed Martin sits at the intersection of geopolitical-energy/defense and the rockets_spacecraft adjacency (Orion, space systems, hypersonics). June 2021 SCIFiRE preliminary-design awards (Boeing/Lockheed/Raytheon, $15-month hypersonic cruise missile contracts under the U.S.-Australia bilateral, becoming HACM) confirm the multi-year hypersonics build cycle the profile flags as a next-wave driver. Profile exclusions (solar/wind) do not hit defense.

Taiwan Semiconductor ADR is the foundry picks-and-shovels complement to NVDA's designer exposure on the AI wave. Q1 2021 revenue hit $12.9B with TSMC capturing ~57% of global foundry revenue (CNBC, May/June 2021); Arizona Fab 21 construction broke ground April 2021 with $12B committed and 5nm process committed to the US site. All dated pre-2021-07-01. Sits on the 'ride AI now, trim before crest' side of the thesis as a lower-multiple supplier rather than a high-multiple model-layer name.

rationale_overall: Wide cap (24) with 16 free slots; current watchlist of 8 is undersized for the multi-wave thesis. Three high-conviction adds, each landing on a distinct wave bucket the profile names but the current list under-covers: CCJ (nuclear fuel-cycle, complements URA basket with single-name leverage), LMT (geopolitical-defense + hypersonics, with dated June-2021 SCIFiRE awards), TSM (AI foundry layer, complements NVDA). No removes: AAPL/MSFT/GOOGL/NVDA are the AI core the profile says to ride (not yet crest); SPY is the broad-market anchor; ARKX/BOTZ/URA are the only existing next-wave exposures and earning their slots at Q2 2021. Quantum and rockets pure-plays (IonQ, RKLB) are post-date and excluded by listing-date guardrail; revisit at later quarters.
